1495.description: Hale Wendhold was first described as average height, lean, brown hair, dark eyes, with restless bearing.

1496.description: Gala Galwood was first described as compact, heavyset, closely shorn hair, green eyes, with alert bearing.

1497.description: Dorn Staneglen the 2nd was first described as towering, lean, brown hair, green eyes, with bold bearing.

1498.description: Vesna Corshore was first described as towering, heavyset, black hair, dark eyes, with bold bearing.

1499.description: Dala Kordmoor was first described as average height, lean, black hair, dark eyes, with somber bearing.
